attachments.fallback: How to Fix Mac Mail Attachments Not Downloading? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If attachments are not downloading in Apple Mail, the issue is usually caused by poor internet connectivity, incorrect account settings, or temporary sync glitches. Start by checking your internet connection and restarting the Mail app to refresh its processes. If the problem persists, rebuild the mailbox to force re-syncing of emails and attachments, and verify that your email account settings ar…
